newsSinceJun6: No material company-specific news since June 6. Today's ~+10% limit-up is flow-driven continuation of the optical-communications/AI-compute sector rally (moving in sync with Zhongji Innolight, Eoptolink, Fiberhome). The real catalysts - China Telecom western hub hollow-core hybrid cable win (May 18) and ~29-31B CNY cumulative order announcements (~May 23-28) - all predate June 6 and are already in the price after a 323% YTD rerating with 10B+ CNY daily turnover.

sources.label: STCN (May 18, 2026): Hengtong wins China Telecom 2026 western info-center hub hollow-core hybrid cable project
STCN (May 28, 2026): Hengtong daily turnover exceeds 10B CNY, no fundamental driver cited
Eastmoney Caifuhao (May 23, 2026): 31B CNY order surge report
Tencent Gu quote/news page showing June 9 +9.69% move alongside optical peers

verdicts.rankRationale: On an alpha list that penalizes post-rerating chase, a flow-driven limit-up (+10%) on top of +323% YTD with zero new fundamental disclosure since June 6 strips out more residual alpha; the hollow-core and order catalysts are mid-May news already fully discovered by a 10B+ CNY/day crowd.
verdicts.bull: Hollow-core fiber leadership (China Telecom and China Mobile wins) plus ~30B CNY order book gives genuine exposure to the scale-out bandwidth bottleneck as 800G/1.6T and west-east compute corridors build out.
verdicts.neutral: AI relevance is real but now consensus: at $35B market cap with extreme turnover, the stock trades as a sector beta vehicle for optical momentum rather than an undiscovered bottleneck name; await earnings to test whether orders convert to margin.
verdicts.bear: A 323% YTD rerating priced largely on order headlines leaves severe air-pocket risk if optical pricing disappoints, hollow-core volumes ramp slower than narrative, or the crowded momentum trade in Chinese optics unwinds.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: H1 2026 results / further hollow-core cable tender wins quantifying revenue and margin from the announced order book.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Crowded momentum unwind: flow-driven limit-ups reversing on any optical-sector cooldown or order-to-revenue conversion disappointment.
